title: OldColors
description: Are you tired of the modern block colors?
body:
###   Hey! Tired of the modern block colors in Minecraft?
### Then you're in the right place!
 
  The OldColors texture pack changes the colors of blocks,
items, shulkers, and adds extra stuff like... 
a new texture for the Ender Dragon?!

![OldColors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/707a2d5197a3f9b5d643bd59a029587650e2147a_0.webp)

!THIS TEXTURE IS STILL UNDER DEVELOPMENT, SO IT 
MAY CONTAIN BUGS OR REUSED TEXTURES FROM MY USB!

**- and requires Polytone -
1.21.11 --- 1.21.6**

### - For a better experience, download:

[Animatium](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatium)

[Moderner Beta](https://modrinth.com/mod/moderner-beta)

[Legacy Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy-display)

[Cascades](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hybrid-beta)
